_comment: Vibe-app attacker/proposer pair (prompts/vibe-app-attacker.md, prompts/vibe-app-proposer.md). Claude plays both roles locally (zero setup, same install as agents.readiness.json) — swap either to "openrouter" + a "model" for a different vendor per role, which also avoids the same-family decorrelation warning. Run: `node orchestrate.mjs --mode vibe-app --config agents.vibeapp.json --task "..."` (or --file). Converges when the attacker's strongest standing finding is at/below --floor (default LOW).
